subjective: Patient reports persistent headache (7/10 pain scale) and neck stiffness for 2 days. No fever, no vomiting. Complains of blurring of vision occasionally. Currently on Amlodipine 5mg OD.
assessment: Hypertension, uncontrolled. Headache likely secondary to uncontrolled BP.
plan: Increase Amlodipine to 10mg OD. Add Losartan 50mg OD. Low sodium diet strictly advised. Return in 1 week for BP recheck. CBC and ECG ordered.

subjective: Routine follow-up for hypertension. Patient reports improved BP at home (130/80 average). No headache, no dizziness. Compliant with medication.
plan: Continue Amlodipine 5mg OD. Lifestyle modification counseled. Return in 1 month.

subjective: Patient with Type 2 DM comes for routine monitoring. FBS at home averaging 180 mg/dL. Reports polydipsia and polyuria. Compliant with Metformin.
plan: Increase Metformin to 1000mg BID. Add Glimepiride 2mg before breakfast. Diabetic diet counseling. HbA1c and fasting lipid profile ordered. Return in 3 weeks.
